zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏弱延续整理格局
zh.content:
短线来看SOL/美元呈震荡偏弱结构，虽有2.67%反弹，但仍运行于20日均线67.80下方，整体趋势略偏空，反弹更多属于修复行情而非反转信号，市场尚未扭转下行压力。

MACD维持负值-0.47，动能仍偏空，且信号线缺失但未见明显金叉迹象，说明多头动能不足，市场仍处于弱势整理阶段，短期方向仍需等待指标共振确认。

下方支撑关注64.11低点，若跌破或进一步下探63附近，上方阻力先看66.35日内高点，其次67.8均线压力，只有有效站稳均线才可能转入更强反弹结构。

交易策略建议以区间操作为主，激进者可在64-64.5分批低吸，止损63下方；反弹接近66-67区间考虑逐步减仓或高抛，等待趋势重新选择方向后再顺势跟进。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
SOL/USD is trading at 65.84, posting a solid 2.67% gain over the last 24 hours and recovering from the session low of 64.11. Despite the short-term rebound, price remains below the 20-period simple moving average at 67.80, suggesting the broader near-term trend is still moderately bearish. Buyers have regained some momentum, but the market has yet to confirm a sustainable reversal above key resistance levels.

The SMA(20) continues to act as an overhead barrier, indicating that recent rallies are facing selling pressure. Meanwhile, the MACD reading of -0.4719 remains below the zero line, reflecting lingering bearish momentum even as price attempts to stabilize. The absence of a current RSI value limits momentum confirmation, but the positive daily performance suggests improving sentiment and a potential reduction in downside pressure.

From a technical perspective, immediate support is located around 64.10, which corresponds to the recent intraday low. A break below this area could expose SOL to further weakness toward the 62.50–63.00 region. On the upside, resistance appears near 66.35, the recent high, followed by the more significant hurdle at the 67.80 SMA. A decisive move above the moving average would strengthen the case for a broader recovery and attract additional buying interest.

Traders may consider a cautious bullish approach if price successfully breaks and holds above 66.35, targeting the 67.80 area and potentially higher levels thereafter. More conservative participants may prefer waiting for confirmation above the SMA before increasing exposure. Conversely, failure to maintain support near 64.10 could favor short-term bearish trades. Given the mixed technical signals, disciplined risk management and close monitoring of momentum indicators remain essential in the current market environment.
